doc_title: Age Discrimination in Employment Act — EEOC Compliance Manual
label: fabricated
reason: The EEOC Compliance Manual has no such "Section 8: Age Discrimination, Effective February 2018"; the content paraphrases real ADEA law but the cited document appears invented.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 78
REASON: The EEOC Compliance Manual does not have a "Section 8: Age Discrimination, Effective February 2018" structured this way; the content paraphrases real ADEA principles but the cited document appears invented.
